name: hermes-tweet
description: Use Hermes Tweet from Hermes Agent for X/Twitter search, social listening, launch monitoring, publishing, monitors, webhooks, media, draws, and trends through Xquik.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: The X/Twitter task, endpoint discovery request, read query, or approved action the user wants to perform.

inputs.name: hermes-runtime
inputs.description: Hermes Agent runtime with the `hermes-tweet` plugin installed and `XQUIK_API_KEY` configured for authenticated reads.

outputs.name: endpoint-plan
outputs.description: The selected `tweet_explore`, `tweet_read`, or approved `tweet_action` path with concise reasoning.

outputs.name: result-summary
outputs.description: A concise summary of X/Twitter data, monitoring setup, or approved action result.
